creator: sirdice@gmail.com
text:
Could somebody update www/php3 to 3.0.14 please?

As 3.0.x will be End-of-Life in November could 3.1.x be added to the ports tree? Preferably using www/php31 so both 3.0.x and 3.1.x are available.

www/phpbb should probably be removed. The 2.0.x branch has been End-of-Life for quite some time (since January 2009) and may contain a lot of security issues.
